items.indication: Crohn disease, ulcerative colitis, active juvenile idiopathic arthritis, complex refractory fistulising Crohn disease, active rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, ankylosing spondylitis, chronic plaque psoriasis, hidradenitis suppurativa
items.outcome_detail: Recommended for inclusion in PBS General Schedule and PBS Section 100

items.indication: Moderate to severe ulcerative colitis, severe juvenile idiopathic arthritis, severe chronic plaque psoriasis, severe Crohn disease, vision-threatening non-infectious uveitis, enthesitis/spondylitis related juvenile idiopathic arthritis
items.outcome_detail: Recommended for inclusion in PBS General Schedule and PBS Section 100

items.indication: Acute severe allergic reactions in children (over 4 years and 15 kg) or adults at significant risk of anaphylaxis
items.outcome_detail: Recommended for inclusion in PBS General Schedule

items.indication: Anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) for adjuvant treatment after tumour resection; re-treatment with ALK inhibitor in metastatic setting
items.outcome_detail: Advice Provided; re-treatment with another ALK inhibitor if cancer advances would be cost-effective

items.indication: Epidermal growth factor receptor gene mutated (EGFRm) locally advanced/metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) with progression during or after osimertinib treatment
items.outcome_detail: Recommended for use in combination with platinum-based doublet chemotherapy

items.indication: Chronic myeloid leukaemia (CML) in chronic phase for initial treatment
Chronic myeloid leukaemia (CML) in chronic phase for continuing treatment; prescribing by nurse practitioners
items.outcome_detail: Recommended to allow prescribing by nurse practitioners for continuing treatment phase

items.indication: Geographic atrophy (GA) secondary to age-related macular degeneration (AMD) with intact fovea and central vision threatened by GA lesion growth
items.outcome_detail: Recommended for PBS General Schedule with pricing reduced and restriction to monocular vision patients

items.indication: Unresectable tumour induced osteomalacia (TIO) presenting with hypophosphataemia due to fibroblast growth factor 23 (FGF23)
items.outcome_detail: Recommended for inclusion in PBS Section 100

items.indication: Colchicine-resistant Familial Mediterranean Fever (crFMF) in paediatric patients continuing into adulthood
items.outcome_detail: Recommended for inclusion in PBS Section 100

items.indication: Severe myoclonic epilepsy in infancy (Dravet syndrome)
items.outcome_detail: Recommended to amend authority requirements to Authority Required (STREAMLINED) and allow prescribing by paediatricians

items.indication: Chronic severe dry eye disease with keratitis in adult patients inadequately controlled by artificial tears substitute
items.outcome_detail: Recommended for inclusion in PBS General Schedule

items.indication: Uncontrolled chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) in adults with raised blood eosinophils on triple inhaled therapy
items.outcome_detail: Recommended as add-on maintenance treatment with price reduction and risk sharing arrangement

items.indication: Gastric cancer (GC) or gastro-oesophageal junction cancer (GOJC) for perioperative treatment with FLOT chemotherapy
items.outcome_detail: Recommended for inclusion in PBS Section 100

items.indication: Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) for initial treatment outside hospital settings
items.outcome_detail: Recommendation made out of session between November 2025 and March 2026

items.indication: Generalised myasthenia gravis (gMG) anti-acetylcholine receptor (AChR) antibody positive for initial and continuing treatment
items.outcome_detail: Recommended for inclusion in PBS General Schedule as pre-filled syringe form

items.indication: Active chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyneuropathy (CIDP) with inadequate response to immunoglobulin or intolerant/refractory to immunoglobulin
items.outcome_detail: Not recommended; insufficient evidence on which patients should receive treatment and clinical benefits uncertain
